calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: February 21, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for plaintiffs' motion for an Order to Distribute the Funds in this action.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Douglas Dukelow, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Mathilda Mason, Hoppie Espree, Dominic Mason, Desmond Mason and Tamara Mason, all of whom were not present.
Defendant-Heir Dorothy L. Mason was not present.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court ruled that as the result of settlements negotiated before the death of Rayce Mason, 100% of which the the property of the Estate of Rayce Mason totaling $123,466.80, are distributed as follows:

100% to Mathilda Mason.

Additionally, the Court ruled that as the result of settlements negotiated after the death of Rayce Mason, totaling $123,466.80, the heirs of decedent Rayce Mason are entitled to distribution of all net post-death settlement funds from the underlying survival, loss of consortium , and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Dorothy L. Mason as Wrongful Death Heir - 10%
Mathilda Mason as Wrongful Death Heir - 5%
Hoppie Espree as Wrongful Death Heir - 20%
Dominic Mason as Wrongful Death Heir - 6.7%
Desmond Mason as Wrongful Death Heir - 6.7%
Tamara Mason as Wrongful Death Heir - 67%

Order was submitted to and signed by the Court.
